en: You guys keep tailing them. I'm going to catch up as soon as I can, okay?
ko: 계속 미행해. 나는 최대한 빨리 합류할게, 알겠지?

en: He really is heroic, isn't he?
No. No, no, no. Oh god, please no, not today.
ko: 안 돼. 안 돼, 안 돼, 안 돼. 제발 안 돼, 오늘은 안 돼.

en: Dude, it's empty. Get over it.
No, you don't understand. I need this to function.
ko: 넌 이해 못 해. 이게 없으면 기능을 못 해.

en: Well, I don't see a dispenser around here, man. You better figure it out.
ko: 근처에 디스펜서가 안 보이는데. 알아서 해.

en: You're fine. Everything's fine. Totally and completely fine.
